title: Use printf (not echo) when piping secrets to vercel CLI — echo appends a newline
rationale: Wasted multiple debug cycles tracing OAuth failures back to \n-contaminated env vars. Simple printf fix prevents a hard-to-diagnose class of deployment errors.
description: Use printf (not echo) when piping secrets to vercel CLI — echo appends a newline that gets stored as part of the secret value, causing silent auth failures downstream
decision_reason: Category: other. Impact: 8/10. Defer until higher-priority signals processed.
